sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Timothy O'Connell Pushes for Sale at Airgain with 7.9% Stake
feed.summary: Timothy O'Connell, along with Haluk L. Bayraktar and Emre Aciksoz, has disclosed a 7.9% stake in Airgain, Inc., filing a Schedule 13D on March 19, 2026. This group asserts that Airgain is undervalued and intends to advocate for a sale of the company, proposing a target price of $11 to $13 per share for shareholders. They plan to engage with management, the board, and other shareholders to push for strategic alternatives, including potentially replacing resistant directors.

feed.title: A Look At Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) Valuation After ICOTYDE Receives U.S. FDA Approval
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) has received U.S. FDA approval for its drug ICOTYDE, leading to increased attention on its commercial potential. Despite a strong stock performance and a high price-to-book ratio of 10.6x, indicating a rich valuation compared to the industry, Simply Wall St's Discounted Cash Flow model suggests the shares may be significantly undervalued. The article highlights the importance of individual research due to mixed signals regarding valuation, risks, and rewards.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation (PRCT) Stockholders to Inquire about Securities Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation (PRCT) stockholders following a disclosed larger-than-expected adjusted EBITDA loss and a cut in full-year 2026 revenue guidance. The firm encourages investors who purchased PROCEPT securities to inquire about this ongoing securities investigation. This investigation comes after PROCEPT's stock price dropped due to changes in its discounting practices affecting consumable revenue.

feed.title: Korean OLED Firms Lead with Superior Cost Efficiency Amidst China’s Struggles
feed.summary: Korean display manufacturers, particularly in the OLED sector, are maintaining a significant cost advantage over Chinese rivals, despite China's aggressive, subsidy-backed expansion. While Korean companies like Samsung Display and LG Display show strong profitability with low cost-of-sales ratios, Chinese firms struggle with profitability due to high costs and low unit prices, leading to financial losses despite increased market share. Korean companies are continuing preemptive investments in next-generation OLED technology, such as 8.6-generation production, to solidify their competitive edge and prevent a repeat of past losses in the LCD market.

feed.title: Pale fire capital group buys Phreesia (PHR) shares worth $18.3 million
feed.summary: A group including Pale Fire Capital SE and other entities purchased 1,602,505 shares of Phreesia, Inc. (NASDAQ:PHR) worth $18.3 million between March 17 and March 19, 2026. This acquisition increased their stake to 7,648,829 shares, occurring while PHR's stock has declined significantly and is trading near its 52-week low. Analyst ratings suggest the stock is undervalued, with price targets between $22 and $35.

feed.title: PRFZ Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:PRFZ
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Invesco RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid ETF (PRFZ), including its current price, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and a description of its investment strategy. It highlights that PRFZ is a fundamental small-cap portfolio that targets companies ranked 1,001-2,500 by fundamental weight and uses fundamental factors for weighting holdings. The article also includes performance data, exposure breakdown, technical analysis, and answers to frequently asked questions about ETFs and PRFZ.

feed.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment 6 75 Cumulative Red Pref Shs Series C (PMT.C) 10K Form and SEC Filings 2026
feed.summary: This article provides a listing of recent SEC filings for PennyMac Mortgage Investment 6 75 Cumulative Red Pref Shs Series C (PMT.C), including Form 10-K annual reports and various Form 4 statements of changes in beneficial ownership of securities. It details filings by executives and the company itself, with dates ranging from late 2025 into March 2026. The stock's current trading price and daily change are also noted.

feed.title: NN Inc stock surges on AI data center awards as strategic pivot gains traction
feed.summary: NN Inc (NASDAQ: NNBR) saw its stock surge by 19.3% after securing multiple contracts for liquid cooling components in AI data centers, marking a significant win in its strategic pivot from legacy automotive parts to high-growth tech sectors. This move validates the company's restructuring efforts and is attracting interest from DACH investors seeking stable US industrial exposure. Insider stock grants further underscore confidence in this AI-driven growth strategy as NN Inc targets nearly 100 new program launches in fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line stock faces pressure amid cruise sector recovery challenges in early 2026
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NCLH) stock is experiencing pressure in early 2026 due to post-pandemic demand shifts and economic headwinds in the leisure travel sector. Investors are closely monitoring booking trends, debt management, and sector volatility, with significant trading volume observed on March 18, 2026. The article highlights NCLH's operational strategies, financial health, and the various risks and opportunities facing its recovery trajectory, especially for DACH (German, Austrian, Swiss) investors.

feed.title: Perfect Moment Extends Insider Loan Maturity to March 31
feed.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd. has once again extended the maturity date of a significant insider loan from its chairman, Max Gottschalk, to March 31, 2026. This $3.39 million loan is part of $5.1 million in unsecured financing first provided in August 2025 to support working capital. The repeated extensions highlight the company's ongoing reliance on insider financing, and its current stock has a Sell rating with a $0.22 price target, with TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also rating it as Neutral due to weak financial fundamentals.

feed.title: Quanta Services Inc. stock drops amid market volatility as dividend declared on NYSE
feed.summary: Quanta Services Inc. shares fell 3.38% on the NYSE amidst broader market pressures, including inflation fears and Middle East tensions, despite the company announcing a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per share. The drop is attributed to market volatility and macro factors, rather than company-specific issues, as Quanta maintains strong fundamentals, a massive backlog, and positive analyst outlooks. DACH investors are particularly interested in its resilience and exposure to global energy transition trends.

feed.title: Fair Isaac closes $1 billion private offering of senior notes due 2034
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) has successfully closed a private offering of $1 billion in 6.250% senior notes due 2034. The company intends to use the proceeds to repay outstanding debt, redeem earlier notes, and for general corporate purposes, including share repurchases. This financial maneuver comes as the stock trades near its 52-week low, and an InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued while management continues aggressive share buybacks.

feed.title: PVH Corp. board lowers threshold for shareholders to call special meetings
feed.summary: PVH Corp. has lowered the ownership threshold for shareholders to call a special meeting from a majority to 25% of outstanding common stock, effective immediately. This change, along with new conditions for calling such meetings, was announced based on an SEC filing. The company also recently had its price target lowered by UBS, declared a quarterly dividend, and announced a partnership with OpenAI to integrate AI into its business operations.

feed.title: Phoenix Education Partners Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. (NYSE: PXED) announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. MST to discuss its Q2 2026 financial results, which will be released the same day after markets close. The call details, including webcast and dial-in information, were provided for investors and media.

feed.title: EU Commission clears acquisition of Clario by Thermo Fisher
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved the acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. by Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. The transaction, primarily related to clinical research organization services and e-Clinical trial solutions, was found not to raise competition concerns. The Commission concluded that the merger would have a limited impact on competition and would not lead to any foreclosure strategies.

feed.title: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Shares Down 7.5% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) shares fell 7.5% intraday due to profit-taking after an AI-led rally, a "sell-the-news" reaction to a recent presentation, management's plan to monetize its remaining SanDisk stake, and significant insider selling. Despite this, the company reported stronger demand visibility from hyperscaler partnerships and a bullish technical "golden cross." WDC also beat EPS and revenue estimates in its recent quarter, leading to multiple analyst price target upgrades and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) Shares Down 1.1% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) shares saw a 1.1% decline on Friday, trading at $277 with significantly higher than average volume. Despite this dip and ongoing regulatory concerns, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price of $372.13, supported by recent insider and institutional buying. The company recently beat Q4 EPS estimates and reported 12.3% revenue growth, offering a 3.2% dividend yield, yet faces headline risks from an ongoing DOJ probe and criticism over CEO pay.

feed.title: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) Shares Down 1.1% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares fell 1.1% to $129.90 on Friday, with trading volume significantly higher than average. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating, though the company recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and announced a $20 billion share buyback and a $.89 quarterly dividend. Despite insider selling, institutional ownership remains strong, with major firms increasing their stakes.

feed.title: Albertsons Subpoenas Ex-Kroger CEO In Merger Fight
feed.summary: Albertsons has subpoenaed former Kroger CEO Rodney McMullen for a two-day deposition in Delaware Chancery Court next month. This action intensifies the discovery process in Albertsons' Delaware lawsuit regarding the collapse of the proposed $24.6 billion merger between the two companies.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Faces Analyst Price Target Cut Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Oil Price Volatility
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Delta Air Lines from $87 to $77, while maintaining a Buy rating, due to rising oil prices stemming from the Iran conflict. Despite this cut, Delta's strong domestic demand and strategic focus on US routes are expected to provide resilience against global disruptions. The airline's fundamentals and market leadership position continue to support long-term investor optimism, particularly for those in DACH regions seeking less volatile aviation exposure.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino, defending his company, takes star role at antitrust trial
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino testified in a New York antitrust trial, defending his company's dominant position against claims of being greedy and abusive to customers. While the federal government and six states have settled, 33 states and D.C. are continuing their legal challenge. Rapino dismissed accusations of shutting out competitors and driving up prices, describing the industry as competitive with narrow profit margins, and addressed controversial internal messages and past ticketing issues.

feed.title: NextNRG Receives Nasdaq Notice on Minimum Bid Price
feed.summary: NextNRG (NXXT) has received a notice from Nasdaq for failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days as of March 16, 2026. The company has until September 14, 2026, to regain compliance, potentially with measures like a reverse stock split. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses NXXT as Neutral due to weak financial quality but acknowledges positive operational momentum.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings Secures New $750 Million Term Loan
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings (LH) has secured a new $750 million senior unsecured term loan, maturing on March 20, 2028. This loan, fully funded at closing, bears a floating interest rate and includes customary covenants, such as a maximum consolidated leverage ratio of 4.0x. An analyst has rated LH stock a Hold with a $300 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as an Outperform due to improving operational outlook and technical momentum.

feed.title: Porch Group (PRCH) insider reports 22.7% ownership stake
feed.summary: Porch Group, Inc. insider Matthew A. Ehrlichman has updated his beneficial ownership to 25,519,591 shares of common stock, representing approximately 22.7% of the outstanding shares. This figure includes directly held shares, shares through West Equities, LLC, and equity from options, RSUs, and performance RSUs exercisable or vesting within 60 days. The filing also details substantial performance-based RSU awards tied to multi-year goals, which are not yet included in current beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) Expands Stake in KeyCorp (KEY)
feed.summary: Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) plans to increase its stake in KeyCorp (KEY) to 19.99%, up from a previously approved 14.99%, without changing the existing relationship between the companies. BNS, a major financial services provider with an $84.08 billion market cap, demonstrates strong profitability and cash flow but faces concerns due to high debt levels and a low dividend yield. While valuation metrics suggest potential undervaluation and technical indicators point to an oversold status, analysts maintain a mixed "hold" sentiment.

feed.title: Quince Therapeutics Faces Nasdaq Listing Compliance Deficiencies
feed.summary: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) has received two notices from Nasdaq regarding compliance deficiencies. The company's stock traded below the $1 minimum bid price for 30 consecutive business days and its market value of listed securities fell below the $50 million threshold for 30 business days. Quince now has until September 14, 2026, to regain compliance for both issues to avoid potential delisting or transfer to another market.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Co stock faces pressure amid 52-week low and shifting analyst views
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams Co (NYSE: SHW) shares have hit a 52-week low of $306.66 USD, down over 4% year-to-date, signaling investor caution despite a resilient dividend history. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $387.13 USD, suggesting over 16% upside from current levels. The company's strong dividend record and potential for market recovery make it a watch for DACH investors amidst sector cyclical pressures and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Trump Suit Against Capital One Dismissed But Can Be Refiled
feed.summary: A US District Judge dismissed the Trump Organization's lawsuit against Capital One, which accused the bank of political discrimination and improperly closing accounts. However, the judge allowed the Trump Organization to refile the suit if it amends its "deficient" complaint, and granted a 90-day period for discovery. The ruling is a mixed result, enabling the Trump Organization to gather evidence for a stronger case.

feed.title: NextEra Energy Issues Long-Dated Subordinated Debentures for Funding
feed.summary: NextEra Energy Capital Holdings has issued $600 million in Series Z Junior Subordinated Debentures due 2086, carrying a 6.50% annual interest rate. These long-dated debentures, guaranteed by parent company NextEra Energy, aim to enhance funding flexibility and align with the duration of the company's energy assets. This move supports NextEra Energy's capital structure and future growth initiatives, despite some analyst concerns about its valuation and leverage.

feed.title: Therapeutics Sector Q4 Results: Revenue Beats Amid Market Stability
feed.summary: A recent analysis of eleven therapeutics companies reveals that they collectively surpassed Q4 revenue estimates by 7.1%, despite stock prices remaining largely stable. Moderna, while experiencing a year-over-year decline, still beat analyst projections, and Novavax showed the strongest performance with a significant revenue increase due to its nanoparticle technology. The sector anticipates future growth driven by precision medicine and rare disease treatments, though it faces challenges from drug cost scrutiny and regulatory uncertainties.

feed.title: [8-K] FAIR ISAAC CORP Reports Material Event | FICO SEC Filing - Form 8-K
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation has completed a private offering of $1.0 billion in 6.250% Senior Notes due 2034. The net proceeds from this offering will be used to repay existing debt, redeem $400 million of 5.25% Senior Notes due 2026, cover related expenses, and for general corporate purposes including potential share repurchases. This refinancing strategy aims to shift part of the company's debt to longer-term fixed-rate capital.

feed.title: Apollo To Invest $1B In 500 Realty Income Single-Tenant Properties
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management will invest $1 billion for a 49% interest in a new joint venture with Realty Income Corp. This partnership will focus on a portfolio of approximately 500 single-tenant retail properties with long-term net leases, with Realty Income continuing to manage the assets. The deal, expected to close on March 31, is part of Realty Income's private capital initiative aimed at diversifying its capital sources.

feed.title: Leidos Secures Key Air Force Contract Amidst Analyst Revisions
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings Inc. has secured a significant $454.9 million U.S. Air Force contract for cloud modernization, leading to a 3.87% stock increase despite recent downward revisions in analyst price targets. The company maintains strong financial metrics, strategic partnerships, and a positive long-term outlook, although some sectors show slowing revenue. Traders are advised to monitor key support and resistance levels for potential entry or exit points.

feed.title: Why Nvidia Stock Is Stuck in a Trading Range—and What Could Finally Break It
feed.summary: This article discusses the recent performance of Netflix stock, noting a 17% increase over the past month. This surge is attributed to Netflix's decision to withdraw from the bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery, resulting in the company being $2.8 billion richer. The piece speculates on what Netflix might do with these newly acquired funds.

feed.title: EyePoint sues rival Ocular Therapeutix, alleging false claims about eye drug
feed.summary: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals has filed a lawsuit against its competitor, Ocular Therapeutix, alleging that Ocular Therapeutix made false claims regarding its eye drug. The lawsuit highlights a legal dispute within the ophthalmology pharmaceutical sector between the two companies.

feed.title: Jayesh Sahasi sells ONTF common shares in three trades (ONTF)
feed.summary: Jayesh Sahasi, an insider at ON24 Inc. (ONTF), reported three instances of common stock sales. These transactions occurred between December 2025 and March 2026, totaling gross proceeds of $452,598.48. The sales appear to be routine and involved various share counts and proceeds on each date.

feed.title: KBW Nasdaq Bank Index Inclusion Could Be A Game Changer For Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP)
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP) has been included in the KBW Nasdaq Bank Index, moving up from the regional banking index, which could increase its visibility and trading liquidity among institutional investors. While this signals recognition of its growth and relationship-driven model, the core investment drivers remain credit quality in commercial real estate and funding costs. The company's recent merger also reshapes its scale but requires careful integration amidst sector-specific challenges.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences Policy Hire Puts Valuation And Returns In Focus
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences has appointed Niranjan Pai as Director, Government Affairs, a move that places an experienced policy professional in a key role for public policy and regulatory engagement. This appointment is significant for investors, as it could influence how effectively the company navigates policy shifts, device regulations, and reimbursement frameworks, which are crucial for a medical equipment business. While the company's 1-year return is positive, its longer-term returns are modest, underscoring the importance of this new role in managing external relationships that affect profitability and market access.

feed.title: Blackstone Private Credit Fund reported total return of -0.4% in February - FT
feed.summary: The Blackstone Private Credit Fund experienced a total return of -0.4% in February, according to an FT report. This information is part of broader news concerning Blackstone Inc., which specializes in managing investment funds and real estate assets. The company's stock, BX, saw a slight decrease of -2.68% at market close on March 20, 2026.

feed.title: Chubb Ltd stock gains spotlight as lead underwriter in major Gulf maritime insurance facility
feed.summary: Chubb Ltd has been selected as the lead underwriter for a U.S. government-backed $20 billion maritime insurance facility for the Strait of Hormuz, a critical role amidst escalating geopolitical tensions. The company reported strong financial performance in 2025, with core operating income of nearly $10 billion, and its stock is endorsed by Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway, which holds an $11 billion stake. Chubb's status as a dividend aristocrat and its low volatility make it an attractive option for DACH investors seeking stable returns in uncertain markets, despite ongoing risks like catastrophe exposure and competition.

feed.title: Halliburton First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) will host a conference call on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET) to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company will issue a press release before the call, which will be posted on its website. A live webcast and a recorded version will be available, and participants can pre-register for dial-in access.

feed.title: Halliburton First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Halliburton Company announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET) to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. A press release detailing the earnings will be issued prior to the call and made available on the company's website. The call will also be accessible via live webcast, with a recorded version available for seven days afterward.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Inc stock faces valuation scrutiny amid resilient travel demand and Q1 2026 anticipation
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc.'s stock experienced a dip despite strong Q4 2025 results and robust travel demand, leading to ongoing valuation debates. While some models suggest the stock is undervalued, market performance shows cooled momentum year-to-date compared to broader indices. Investors are closely watching the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings for further sentiment indication, with DACH investors particularly interested in its exposure to the resilient European tourism market.

feed.title: Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE:PBT) to Issue $0.01 Monthly Dividend
feed.summary: Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: PBT) has declared a monthly dividend of $0.0107 per share, payable on April 14th to shareholders of record as of March 31st. This dividend provides an annualized yield of about 0.6%. The trust, established in 1980, operates as a passive investment vehicle, holding overriding royalty interests in West Texas oil and gas properties without engaging in exploration or production.

feed.title: Lennox International, Inc. (NYSE:LII) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $1.30
feed.summary: Lennox International, Inc. (NYSE:LII) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.30 per share, payable on April 15th to shareholders of record on March 31st. The company has a strong dividend history, having raised it for 16 consecutive years with a low payout ratio of 20.6%. Despite recent mixed financial results, with a Q4 EPS and revenue miss, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $579.64.

feed.title: Quince Therapeutics Disclosed Failure to Satisfy a Continued Listing Rule or Standard
feed.summary: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) has received notices from Nasdaq indicating its failure to meet the minimum bid price and market value of listed securities requirements. The company has until September 14, 2026, to regain compliance, and its stock continues to trade on the Nasdaq Global Select Market. This information is based on an SEC filing from March 20, 2026.

feed.title: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) hit with dual Nasdaq listing deficiency notices
feed.summary: Quince Therapeutics (QNCX) has received two deficiency notices from Nasdaq, citing failure to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price and the $50,000,000 market value of listed securities requirements. The company has until September 14, 2026, to regain compliance for both issues by maintaining the required metrics for at least ten consecutive business days. Quince Therapeutics is exploring options, including a potential reverse stock split, to address these deficiencies and avoid delisting, while its stock continues to trade on the Nasdaq Global Select Market.

feed.title: Precision Optics Stockholders Back Board, Pay and Auditor
feed.summary: Precision Optics Corporation stockholders overwhelmingly approved the nominated directors, executive compensation, and the appointment of Stowe & Degon, LLC as their auditor at the annual meeting on March 19, 2026. This indicates strong investor confidence in the company's leadership and financial oversight. Despite a Hold rating from analysts and a Neutral score from TipRanks' AI Analyst due to profitability concerns and cash burn, the approval emphasizes continuity and support for the current governance structure.

feed.title: AI Investing Insights - Official Homepage - Intellectia AI™
feed.summary: This page from Intellectia AI provides an overview of the PSWD ETF, which focuses on cybersecurity companies meeting certain sustainability criteria. It displays real-time price data, asset composition, and top holdings, while emphasizing Intellectia AI's role as a platform for AI-powered investing tools and insights. The fund uses a passive indexing approach to track its underlying index.

feed.title: Pony AI (PONY) expands robotaxi access via Tencent integration
feed.summary: Pony AI is expanding access to its robotaxi services by integrating with Tencent's map and ride-hailing platforms. This collaboration will allow users of Tencent's platforms to hail Pony.ai's autonomous vehicles, significantly broadening the availability of its services. The move highlights Pony AI's strategy to increase its user base and operational reach through strategic partnerships with major tech companies.
